title: Multi-Tenant AuthZ Isolation
description: Design permissioning frameworks that enforce strict tenant boundaries in multi-tenant architectures. Implement 'Contextual Identity' to ensure data and logic isolation between tenants. Prevent cross-tenant data leaks at both the application and data layers.
objectives: Design permissioning frameworks that enforce strict tenant boundaries in multi-tenant architectures.
Implement 'Contextual Identity' to ensure data and logic isolation between tenants.
Prevent cross-tenant data leaks at both the application and data layers.
